chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 435 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 5935/2025. 06.11.2025. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicant. Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant does not wish to press this Lis. He contends that he would be satisfied if this Court passes the directions that the police authorities extend protection to the parties. No prejudice will be caused if such police protection is provided in accordance with law. In view of the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
